docs.title: Welcome to Sample MkDocs
docs.text: What you have to do? - Clone or Use this repo (Uncheck "Copy the main branch only" option) - Enable Github Actions - Go to Settings > Pages, and select the gh-pages branch as source then save.

docs.title: AI Agent
docs.text: What is an AI agent? An AI agent is a software program that uses artificial intelligence to perform tasks or make decisions on behalf of a user. AI agents can be used in a variety of applications, including customer service, data analysis, and automation.
